caption: Figure 1.9b. Deployment of Overseas Foreign Workers by sex, new hires only (in thousands)
description: A grouped bar chart showing the number of new hires for overseas foreign workers from 2016 to 2020, categorized by sex (Male and Female). The bars are color-coded by year: 2016 (blue), 2017 (red), 2018 (yellow), 2019 (green), and 2020 to September (light blue).
